title: Baseline on monday.com

posts.author: V-Marie (Marie M.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

Gantt chart is awesome!
But Gantt view should have a simple display comparing this new due date to the original one, giving us a great Baseline view. This would be a great addition to the Project Progress screen.

posts.author: JulieLucidDay (julie@lucidday.com)
posts.cookedHtml: @V-Marie This might not be a perfect solution for what you need, but you could just create a second timeline column “Actual” that would show in the Gantt alongside the baseline. It’s not completely user-friendly because you can’t make the two distinct in any way (like different colors or names) but it would at least show both.

posts.author: okennis (Olivia Kennis)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @V-Marie ! Olivia here from monday.com. Great question – we will be releasing a Baseline checkbox on the Gantt view at some point this Q. Stay tuned!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have tested the baseline view and it is pretty sweet! My only issue is the clutter it adds to the boards (an additional 3 columns per baseline). Other than that, its pretty sweet! Maybe something to keep in mind @okennis as this evolves is to make it a bit more hidden…

Thanks!
Mark
